title: Vir Biotechnology, Inc. (VIR) Reports Q3 2024 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Vir Biotechnology announced their Q3 2024 earnings on 10/31/2024. Total revenues were $2.4 million with a reported net loss of $213.7 million. The actual EPS was $-1.56, which missed the estimate of $-1.05. The actual revenue of $2.4M missed the estimate of $5.5M. Significant corporate developments included an exclusive licensing agreement with Sanofi and key leadership appointments, while also providing updates on its clinical pipeline progress in hepatitis and oncology. R&D expenses for Q3 2024 were approximately $195 million compared to $145 million for the same period in 2023, with the increase primarily driven by approximately $103 million of expense related to the Sanofi transaction. The company ended the third quarter with cash, cash equivalents and investments of approximately $1.19 billion. The company is advancing an immuno-oncology and infectious disease pipeline with strong efficacy and safety data for its masked T-cell engager in prostate cancer and a promising dual regimen for hepatitis delta, supported by strategic partnerships and financing extending cash runway to 2028.
